title: pilosella hoppeana subsp. macrohoppeana
intro: Pilosella hoppeana subsp. macrohoppeana, also known as Alpine Mouse-ear, is a rare species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Pilosella hoppeana subsp. macrohoppeana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as an infusion or decoction, although its use is largely limited to research and traditional medicine due to its rarity and lack of commercial cultivation.
